title: fix: keep sidecar unready on component init failure
body:
## Description
This change keeps the sidecar unready when component initialization fails during startup. Previously, the runtime could continue past the component flush step after component processing had already failed, which allowed readiness to be marked even though startup had not completed successfully.

## Issue reference
Fixes #7326

## Checklist
- [x] Code compiles correctly
- [x] Created/updated tests
- [x] Unit tests passing
- [ ] End-to-end tests passing
- [ ] Extended the documentation / Created issue in the https://github.com/dapr/docs/ repo: dapr/docs#7326
- [ ] Specification has been updated / Created issue in the https://github.com/dapr/docs/ repo: dapr/docs#7326
- [ ] Provided sample for the feature / Created issue in the https://github.com/dapr/docs/ repo: dapr/docs#7326
